import Navbar from "../components/Navbar" import { useEffect, useState } from "react" import API from "../api/axios" export default function Home() { const [data,setData]=useState([]) useEffect(()=>{ API.get("/restaurants").then(res=>setData(res.data)) },[]) return (

Discover great places

Recent Activity

{data.slice(0,6).map(r=>(

{r.name}

{r.cuisine_type}

★ {r.avg_rating}

))}

Categories

{["Restaurants","Shopping","Nightlife","Active Life","Beauty","Automotive","Home","More"].map((c,i)=>(

{c}

))}

Explore cities

{["Los Angeles","New York","Chicago","Houston","San Diego","Las Vegas","San Francisco","Dallas","San Jose","Phoenix"].map((c,i)=>( ))}
) }
